title: store.rs BEGIN IMMEDIATE for all read-then-write atomic ops (mostly)
description: store.rs: save_key_package_capped, enqueue, next_diversifier, count_and_create_invoice, alloc_diversifier_and_create_invoice, group_add_member_atomic, group_leave_atomic, group_create_capped all correctly use BEGIN IMMEDIATE to serialize concurrent read-then-write operations. This pattern is consistent and correct. Exception: advance_diversifier_to and drain use pool.begin() (DEFERRED) which is a bug filed separately. The overall discipline is good and should be maintained.
